message:
fix(pager): remove unreachable dead-code guard in checkpoint

The `if sole_connection && effective_mode != mode` block was
unreachable by construction: when sole_connection is true, the
match arm `if !sole_connection` never fires, so effective_mode
always equals mode. The comment admitted this. Remove it to
avoid confusing future readers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
